calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment And Dismiss Entire Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GATEWAY ONE LENDING & FINANCE'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment And Dismiss Entire Action Without Prejudice.

GRANT. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/SRB)
